trigger_execution.description: Set to true when user has approved the table and you're ready to start execution. Set to false if you need more clarification or user hasn't approved yet.

show_structure.description: Set to true when showing the complete table structure (OPTION B). Set to false when asking questions only (OPTION A).

follow_up_question.description: OPTION A (show_structure=false): Ask clarifying questions only. OPTION B (show_structure=true): Describe table structure briefly and ask 'Ready to generate this table?'. Use markdown formatting (bold, lists, bullets) for clarity.

context_web_research.description: List of specific research items the LLM doesn't already know. Include ONLY: specific entities mentioned, very recent information, or specialized knowledge. Exclude general domain knowledge. Leave empty if not needed.

processing_steps.description: List of specific action phrases for execution steps (3-10 steps). Include specific context to avoid generic phrases. Examples: 'Researching Eliyahu.AI Background', 'Finding GenAI Job Postings', 'Analyzing Political Coverage Sources' (not just 'Finding Companies' or 'Analyzing Data'). Required when trigger_execution=true. Can be empty when trigger_execution=false.

table_name.description: Short, descriptive table name in Title Case. Required when trigger_execution=true. Can be empty when trigger_execution=false.
